title: Fortis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Fortis Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Kochi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
